_preamble: Premium dark epic-fantasy, MMO-RPG splash-art quality, deep obsidian blacks, ornate gold detail, dramatic cinematic lighting, painterly, ultra-detailed, [ACCENT] glow accent. No text, no UI, no letters, no numbers, no watermark, no logos.
_guardian_template: [preamble] An imposing 'Opening Guardian' figure: [BRIEF]; looming over a chessboard, [ACCENT] glow, isolated on dark atmospheric background.

items.brief: a towering highland warlord, tartan-wrapped over crimson-bronze plate, a great claymore mid-swing splitting a stone chessboard, stag-skull pauldron, standing in cold mist lit by molten-gold cracks, powerful downward strike pose, crimson rim-light through fog

a hooded gambit-sorcerer in crimson-and-gold robes, a bone scythe trailing glowing pawn-runes that rise into spectral chess pieces, gaunt commanding figure over a board sprouting sigils, arms spread summoning, crimson glow, swirling ash and gold sparks

a colossal obsidian-scaled dragon coiled diagonally, molten-gold underbelly, breathing a stream of fire along a glowing diagonal of chessboard squares, wings half-spread, head low and menacing toward the viewer, crimson-and-gold inferno light, embers and heat-haze

a tall veiled sorceress-queen in a flowing violet gown patterned with chessboard motifs, gold crown and filigree, extending one hand offering a glowing jeweled pawn, behind her a cloak that unfurls into ranks of chess pieces, serene dangerous poise, soft purple-gold court light, drifting motes

a lean robed mystic strategist in indigo-violet robes with gold geometric trim, one hand outstretched casting glowing chains that bind a kneeling knight chess piece, floating board-squares around him, calm authoritative gesture, purple astral light, fine gold linework, star motes

an elegant architect-noble in violet and gold, holding a crystalline bishop chess piece emitting a golden ray along a glowing diagonal, a cathedral of floating geometry behind, poised precise stance, purple ambient with a bright gold diagonal beam
a regal commander on a violet moor at dusk, gold-trimmed cloak, a war banner raised, a faint mirrored double of himself looming behind, commanding outstretched arm, cool purple fog, gold edge-light

a broad armored warden in emerald-trimmed grey stone-plate, a vast tower-shield carved with a pawn formation, planted immovably before a portcullis, ivy creeping over his armor, rooted immovable stance, soft emerald torchlight, mossy stone

a tall hooded sentinel in layered emerald-and-grey scale armor forming an interlocking shield-wall of pawn-shaped shields before him, spear grounded, perfectly still, weathered patient face half-shadowed, cool emerald dawn light, faint mist, stone behind

a poised armored chevaliere in emerald-and-silver with fleur-de-lis engraving, behind a diagonal wall of interlocked pawn-shields, a rapier ready at the wall's base, elegant defensive guard stance, emerald torch glow on stone, banners, light haze

a massive Slavic bogatyr warrior in bear-fur over emerald-bronze plate, a round shield and broad axe, standing immovable on cracked river-ice that mirrors him, calm stance with feet planted, cold emerald light, frost mist, faint aurora

a knight in flawless mirror-polished emerald-silver armor standing before a giant reflective shield that doubles him, both figure and reflection in identical guard, near-mirrored symmetry composition, cool emerald light, sharp reflections, still water floor

a lithe Norse trickster-skald in cyan-and-frost furs and a fox mask, conjuring a glowing mirage-queen of light as a decoy, aurora ribbons and runes swirling, sly beckoning pose, cyan-teal glow, frost sparkles, smoke wisps

a translucent phantom-illusionist forming out of cyan steam over a sunken pool, ornate Hungarian mask and robes half-dissolving into vapor, mischievous reaching gesture, teal-cyan glow through steam, wet tile reflections, lantern bokeh

a small impish trickster perched on a giant knight chess piece, offering it forward with a too-wide grin, hidden cyan trap-threads glinting behind, playful menace leaning toward the viewer, cyan glow, sparks, dark bazaar shadow

a flamboyant masked juggler in cyan-and-white motley, juggling three burning pawns over an open glowing file, sparks arcing, theatrical mid-toss flourish, cyan-and-ember mixed glow, smoke, lantern-lit bazaar

a wiry jester in cyan-belled motley and a cracked porcelain grin-mask, offering a pawn with one hand while a cyan noose of glowing threat-lines coils from the other, manic theatrical bow, cyan glow, scattered playing-card and chess motifs, smoky stage light

BACKGROUND ONLY, no characters: a tall vertical golden throne hall interior, dark obsidian columns with ornate gold arches, braziers of fire along the sides, a warm focal glow at the center, atmospheric haze, vast ceiling height, empty floor space at the bottom

BACKGROUND ONLY, no characters: a tall vertical fantasy landscape, volcanic crimson-and-gold mountain realm, a winding empty path climbing through it with no markers, floating rocks and golden clouds, vast atmospheric depth, room for overlaid nodes

BACKGROUND ONLY, no characters: a tall vertical mystical dark hall with ornate gold-runed pillars, soft golden particles drifting, a faint glowing chessboard floor fading into darkness, deep atmospheric vignette, calm focused mood, empty center

BACKGROUND ONLY, no characters: a tall vertical ceremonial chamber, an ornate golden archway portal glowing at the center, drifting gold motes and light rays, obsidian-black surroundings, sense of revelation, empty center

BACKGROUND ONLY, no characters: a tall vertical colosseum-like dark arena, obsidian stone tiers and gold banners, torchlight and embers, a dramatic empty dueling floor at the bottom, ominous atmospheric depth
